name: Security Management Process
description: Establish and maintain a security management process that includes identifying and reducing risks to electronic protected health information.

name: Workforce Security
description: Apply workforce access procedures so only appropriate personnel can access electronic protected health information.

name: Security Awareness and Training
description: Provide a security awareness and training program for the workforce with ongoing reinforcement.

name: Access Control
description: Implement technical access controls so electronic protected health information is available only to authorized people and systems.

name: Audit Controls
description: Record and examine system activity involving systems that store or use electronic protected health information.

name: Transmission Security
description: Protect electronic protected health information when it is transmitted across networks.
